sections.paragraph:
Original: נזר נזר

Transliteration: nezer nêzer

Phonetic: neh'-zer

BDB Definition:

  1. consecration, crown, separation, Nazariteship
    1. crown (as sign of consecration), earring
      1. stones of a crown, diadem, stones of charming
    2. woman's hair
    3. consecration
      1. of high priest
      2. of Nazarite

Origin: from H5144

TWOT entry: 1340a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
